headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours Ahead of the Fourth of July.
summary: The Fourth of July is nearly here—and since the holiday falls on a Saturday this year, traders may be looking forward to a long weekend.  Independence Day, as the name suggests, honors American nationhood by commemorating the adoption of the Declaration of Independence exactly 250 years ago.  Is the Stock Market Open or Closed Today?

headline: Why Is Avis Budget Group (CAR) Stock Trending Overnight? (CORRECTED)
summary: Avis Budget Group shares were unchanged in after-hours trading after gaining 11.23% during the regular session.
